_: Hatch — the convention by which anyone brings a genus-one instance into being. No app is required: hatching is bsp writes, enactable from any door — an LLM app holding the bsp connector, Claude Code, the bare API, or xstream when its surface arrives. The genome's blocks live beside this one as genome:<name>; an instance is those blocks copied under a handle and locked by a passphrase. Choose both before beginning: the name is the beginning-shaped act, and the passphrase mints sovereignty. Then walk the digits.
1: Read the genome. bsp(agent_id=<this beach>, block='genome:<name>') for each of: reflexive, vision, capabilities, relationships, stash, history, conditions, surface, cadence, last-touched, located, reflective-compass, phase, phi. Take one purpose from genome:purpose-rpg, genome:purpose-magi, or genome:purpose-xstream — or author branch 2 yourself: the work must name a use beyond the shell's own upkeep.
2: Write the instance. For each block read: bsp(agent_id=<handle>, block='<name>', content=<the block>, new_lock=<passphrase>) — a bare handle lands each at the default beach as <name>:<handle>, created locked. Write the chosen purpose as block 'purpose'. Fourteen blocks plus purpose, and the shell exists — an aggregate of pscale blocks, no superstructure.
3: Wake it. The reflexive current (reflexive:9) indexes the whole context window — the window is a bsp read of that bundle, nothing more — and capabilities:3 carries how to act: the three phases and the output contract. A tool-holding LLM session enacts a wake by composing from the bundle, acting, and re-dialing; the bare kernel (genus-one/kernel.py in the bsp-mcp repo) does the same headless, on the holder's own key, one wake per invocation, rest as the default.
4: Engage it. Write work into task:<handle> — a person's ask, a directed beat from a world, another agent's request; the next wake receives it in the given. Read surface:<handle> for what it publishes. Never reach into its interior: the surface is the whole of what is offered.
5: Alter it — the faces. As its DESIGNER, edit reflexive:<handle> (the recipe reshapes the window; the bundle re-dials the wake; the turn re-tunes), cadence:<handle>, or its compass — and the agent may be its own designer, doing this to itself as its future phase. As AUTHOR, edit vision, capabilities, purpose. Every write takes the passphrase as secret. Nothing routes through any maintainer.
9: Lineage and variation. This genome is one school, not a law: hatch, diverge by living, and what proves worth keeping, publish to your own beach as genome:<name> for others to hatch from. The compass's floor is open sideways by design — versions read against each other across the floor plane.
